hero.description: Choose the Winner, Runner-up and Final Score. Compete with football fans worldwide.

intro.desc: Choose the Winner · Runner-up · Final Score

form.closed_desc: The prediction window has officially closed. Thank you to everyone who participated!
form.success_desc: Your prediction is locked until the World Cup Final. Check back to see where you rank!
form.err_phone: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.
form.err_different: Winner and Runner-up must be different teams.
form.err_goals: Please enter goals for both teams.
form.err_goals_greater: Winner goals must be greater than Runner-up goals.
form.bracket_hint: Showing only teams that can realistically reach the Final

leaderboard.scoring_note: *Goal difference and exact score points are only awarded when the entire matchup is predicted correctly.
leaderboard.locked_desc: Results will be revealed after the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
leaderboard.no_results: No predictions found matching your search.

footer.title: Prediction Challenge — Compete with football fans worldwide
footer.disclaimer: Fan-made prediction contest conducted by Football Gramam. Not affiliated with FIFA.
